CustomField.label: Walk-In Reserve Count
CustomField.description: Formula (design §2.3/§2.1): CEILING(VS_Total_Capacity__c * WalkInReservePct / 100). WalkInReservePct is read from VS_Setting__mdt (VS-02's deliverable, currently 25% per D-009) via a $CustomMetadata merge field — NOT hardcoded, per rules/20. DEPLOY DEPENDENCY: this formula reference will fail deploy validation until the VS_Setting__mdt custom metadata type and its "WalkInReservePct" record (VS-02) exist in the org/deployment; see VS-01 review packet.
